documentLocal: Γενικό Πιστοποιητικό ΓΕΜΗ (also Πιστοποιητικό Ισχύουσας Εκπροσώπησης for representation)
summary: The General Commercial Registry (ΓΕΜΗ/GEMI) is the constitutive public register for the IKE under L.4919/2022. It issues a general certificate that functions as the register extract, evidencing the company's identity, seat, capital, managers/representation and registered acts. This is the base register document for an IKE.

evidence.note: Article 17 title (verbatim, retrieved from TOC); full text paywalled. Art. 46 'Πρόσβαση στα στοιχεία του Γ.Ε.ΜΗ.' governs access to the register data.

caveats: Exact certificate label varies: 'Γενικό Πιστοποιητικό' (history of acts) vs 'Πιστοποιητικό Ισχύουσας Εκπροσώπησης' (current representation) vs 'Αναλυτικό Πιστοποιητικό'. INFERENCE from GEMI practice; the precise catalogue article of L.4919/2022 (certificates/copies) was not fetched verbatim.
Verbatim statutory text was behind paywalls; only article titles were retrieved.

documentLabel: Articles of association plus registered share-transfer announcements
documentLocal: Καταστατικό (κωδικοποιημένο) + ανακοινώσεις μεταβίβασης εταιρικών μεριδίων στο ΓΕΜΗ
summary: For an IKE the partners (εταίροι) and their shares (εταιρικά μερίδια) are provable from GEMI: the founding partners and their contributions are stated in the καταστατικό (N.4072/2012 art. 50), and every inter-vivos transfer of a share must be registered/published in GEMI (art. 84). Current holdings are therefore reconstructed from the codified articles plus the registered transfer announcements — an additional document set beyond the plain register extract. The company additionally keeps an internal βιβλίο εταίρων (art. 66), but that book is not the GEMI-sourced proof.

evidence.note: Article 50 title (verbatim); the καταστατικό states founding partners and their μερίδια. Full text not fetched.
Article 84 title (verbatim); inter-vivos transfer of an IKE share is subject to GEMI publicity, so partner changes are on the public register. Full sentence not fetched verbatim.
Article 66 title (verbatim); the company keeps a register of partners (βιβλίο εταίρων) internally — not the registry proof.

caveats: There is no single German-style standalone 'Gesellschafterliste' document at GEMI for an IKE; the current member list is assembled from the codified καταστατικό and registered transfer announcements. Classified as additional (not base) document.

That GEMI transfer publicity is constitutive/effective vis-à-vis third parties for IKE shares is INFERENCE from art. 84 title; the operative sentence was not fetched verbatim (paywalled). UNVERIFIED at quote level.
The internal βιβλίο εταίρων (art. 66) is not obtainable from the registry.

summary: The IKE's constitution (καταστατικό) is filed with and published by GEMI and is retrievable as a distinct document (the codified/current articles), separate from the register-extract certificate. Its required content is set by N.4072/2012 art. 50. Provable from the registry via this additional document.

evidence.note: Article 50 title (verbatim). Full text not fetched.
GEMI commercial publicity covers the καταστατικό and its amendments; downloadable copy.

caveats: Treated as an 'additional document' because it is a distinct downloadable filing, not the register-extract certificate itself.
Availability of a fully codified καταστατικό vs. only the successive amendment filings varies by how the company has maintained its GEMI file. Verbatim article text not fetched (paywalled).

documentLocal: Γενικό Πιστοποιητικό ΓΕΜΗ (also Πιστοποιητικό Ισχύουσας Εκπροσώπησης)
summary: GEMI is the constitutive public register for the AE (L.4919/2022; L.4548/2018 art. 12 lists the acts/data subject to GEMI publicity). Its general certificate is the register extract evidencing identity, seat, capital, board/representation and registered acts — the base register document for an AE.

evidence.quote: Πράξεις και στοιχεία που υποβάλλονται σε δημοσιότητα στο Γ.Ε.ΜΗ.
evidence.note: Article 12 title (verbatim); enumerates what an AE files with GEMI. Full text not fetched.

caveats: Certificate label precision (Γενικό vs Ισχύουσας Εκπροσώπησης vs Αναλυτικό) is INFERENCE from GEMI practice; the certificate-catalogue article of L.4919/2022 was not fetched verbatim.
Verbatim statutory text was paywalled; only article titles retrieved.

summary: An AE's shareholders are NOT held at GEMI. For registered shares the company itself keeps the book of shareholders (βιβλίο μετόχων) under N.4548/2018 art. 40; for listed companies holdings are dematerialised in the central securities depository (ΣΑΤ/ΕΛΚΑΤ), not GEMI. GEMI's public file shows only the founders (ιδρυτές) named in the original καταστατικό at incorporation, not the current shareholder body. Therefore a current shareholder list is not provable from the registry.

evidence.note: Article 40 title (verbatim); registered shares are recorded in the company-kept βιβλίο μετόχων, not in GEMI. Full text not fetched.

caveats: Only the founders and their initial subscription in the original καταστατικό are public (historical, incorporation-only) — this is not a current shareholder list.

Bearer shares were abolished; all AE shares are now registered (ονομαστικές), but the register of them is private (company book) or in the CSD for listed AEs. That the βιβλίο μετόχων is company-kept and not GEMI-filed is well established but the operative sentence of art. 40 was not fetched verbatim (paywalled) — UNVERIFIED at quote level.

summary: The AE's constitution (καταστατικό) is filed with and published by GEMI (N.4548/2018 art. 12 lists it among acts subject to publicity) and is retrievable as a distinct codified document separate from the register-extract certificate. Provable from the registry via this additional document.

evidence.quote: Πράξεις και στοιχεία που υποβάλλονται σε δημοσιότητα στο Γ.Ε.ΜΗ.
evidence.note: Article 12 title (verbatim); the καταστατικό and its amendments are subject to GEMI publicity. Full text not fetched.
GEMI commercial publicity; downloadable copy of the articles.

caveats: Treated as an 'additional document' (a distinct downloadable filing), not the register-extract certificate itself.
Whether a single fully-codified καταστατικό is on file vs. only the original plus amendment announcements depends on the company's GEMI maintenance. Verbatim article text not fetched (paywalled).
